R0252.title: Connected-Vehicle Data Interface Abuse
R0252.definition: Connected-vehicle APIs, diagnostic interfaces, or third-party in-vehicle apps are abused to read location and driving data.
R0252.description: Connected-vehicle APIs, diagnostic interfaces, or third-party in-vehicle apps are abused to read location and driving data.
R0252.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
